content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be reengineered to dynamically prune and prioritize curiosity-driven intrinsic reward traces from ICM and RND methods, instead of just storing task-specific interaction data. This creates a "curiosity memory gradient" that directs active sampling toward under-explored state spaces that are actually predictive of long-term task improvement, rather than just novel or noisy states.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
